channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3317] ASSERTION( it_disposition(it, 0x00800000) ) failed:
item.description:
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ----============= acceptance-small: racer ============---- Fri May 10 00:49:19 PDT 2013
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: excepting tests:
Lustre: Layout lock feature supported.
Lustre: Mounted smplust-client
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=20
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == racer test 1: racer on clients: c08,c09,c10,c11,c12,c13,c14,c15,c18,c19,c20,c21,c22,c23,c24 DURATION=900 == 00:49:23 (1368172163)

LustreError: 11370:0:(file.c:2718:ll_inode_revalidate_fini()) Skipped 2 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19417:0:(file.c:640:ll_file_open()) ASSERTION( it_disposition(it, 0x00800000) ) failed:
LustreError: 19417:0:(file.c:640:ll_file_open()) LBUG
Pid: 19417, comm: ls

Call Trace:
[<ffffffffa03fa895>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
[<ffffffffa03fae97>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]
[<ffffffffa0a0e6e3>] ll_file_open+0xc23/0xc30 [lustre]
[<ffffffffa09efd40>] ? ll_dir_open+0x0/0xf0 [lustre]
[<ffffffffa09efe1b>] ll_dir_open+0xdb/0xf0 [lustre]
[<ffffffff8117e1aa>] __dentry_open+0x10a/0x360

[<ffffffff8100c535>] ? math_state_restore+0x45/0x60

[<ffffffff8100b072>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b

LustreError: dumping log to /tmp/lustre-log.1368172779.19417
LustreError: 6511:0:(file.c:2718:ll_inode_revalidate_fini()) smplust: revalidate FID [0x200003acf:0x77e8:0x0] error: rc = -116
LustreError: 6511:0:(file.c:2718:ll_inode_revalidate_fini()) Skipped 6 previous similar messages
INFO: task ls:19417 blocked for more than 120 seconds.

will provide maloo report if/when it's available
item.environment:
https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/1481/

Run auster test-group/full while setting NRS policies in a loop

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
I think this is similar to LU-2275, see the server side patch http://review.whamcloud.com/4459

The root cause is we somehow did not return error from IT_OPEN, but no error either.
reading logs should provide more info
lustre-log.1368172779.19417 is available at ftp/uploads/LU-3317
